case_title: DANIEL WONG VS. A FLYING CAMERA

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT A FLYING CAMERA

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: COPY OF SC-100 CLAIM MAILED TO EVAN O'HARE ON 3/14/18 - ("GREEN CARD" PREVIOUSLY RETURNED TO THE COURT WITHOUT ENVELOPE). PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
